---
title: ""
subtitle: ""
about: 
  template: jolla
  image: "images/profile-pic-bw.png"
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15rem
format:
  html: 
    page-layout: article
---



```{=html}

<!-- Include Tippy.js and Popper.js -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/tippy.js@6/dist/tippy.css" />
<script src="https://unpkg.com/@popperjs/core@2"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/tippy.js@6"></script>

<!-- Additional CSS for layout and style -->
<style>
  #hero-heading {
    text-align: left; /* Align text to the left */
    margin: 1rem 0;
  }
  #hero-heading ul {
    padding-left: 1.5rem; /* Add indentation for bullet points */
  }
  #hero-heading li {
    margin-bottom: 1rem; /* Space between bullet points */
  }
  .tooltip-term {
    color: #007BFF; /* Blue text for terms */
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: bold;
    text-decoration: underline;
  }
  .tooltip-term:hover {
    color: #0056b3; /* Darker blue on hover */
  }
</style>

```

```{=html}
<div id="hero-heading">
  <p>
    <strong>Abdelkarim el Ghani</strong> is a Research Assistant at the
    <a href="https://www.eur.nl/" target="_blank">Erasmus University Rotterdam</a>.
    His expertise lies in:
  </p>

  <ul>
    <li>
      <span class="tooltip-term" data-template="data-analysis">Statistical data analysis</span>
    </li>
    <li>
      <span class="tooltip-term" data-template="neuroscience">Neuroscience</span>
    </li>
    <li>
      <span class="tooltip-term" data-template="open-science">Open science practices</span>
    </li>
  </ul>

  <p>Driven by a passion for data-driven problem-solving, Abdelkarim's work involves:</p>

  <ul>
    <li>
      <span class="tooltip-term" data-template="programming">Programming</span>
    </li>
    <li>
      <span class="tooltip-term" data-template="data-visualization">Data visualization</span>
    </li>
    <li>
      <span class="tooltip-term" data-template="reproducible-research">Reproducible research</span>
    </li>
  </ul>

  <p>Hover over any term to learn more about what it means in my day-to-day work!</p>
</div>

<!-- Tooltip Content (Hidden) -->
<div style="display: none;">
  <div id="data-analysis">
    Turning raw data into meaningful insights through advanced statistical methods.
  </div>
  <div id="neuroscience">
    Exploring the brain's complexity and the factors that shape human behavior.
  </div>
  <div id="open-science">
    Promoting transparency, accessibility, and collaboration in research.
  </div>
  <div id="programming">
    Utilizing tools like R, Python, and Quarto for reproducible workflows.
  </div>
  <div id="data-visualization">
    Transforming numbers into compelling visual stories.
  </div>
  <div id="reproducible-research">
    Ensuring findings can be verified and built upon by others.
  </div>
</div>



```


```{=html}
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    const terms = document.querySelectorAll('.tooltip-term');
    
    terms.forEach((term, index) => {
      tippy(term, {
        content(reference) {
          const id = reference.getAttribute('data-template');
          const template = document.getElementById(id);
          return template ? template.innerHTML : '';
        },
        allowHTML: true, // Enable HTML content in tooltips
        theme: 'light',
        animation: 'scale',
        arrow: true,
        delay: [index * 100, 100], // Staggered delay for tooltips
      });
    });
  });
</script>






```
